    def _restore_retry_schedule(self) -> int:
        if not self.registry.is_persistent():
            return 0
        tasks = self.registry.list_by_status(TaskStatus.FAILED, limit=5000)
        restored = 0
        now_ts = time.time()
        for task in tasks:
            if int(task.retry_count) >= int(task.max_retries):
                continue
            retry_due_at_raw = (task.metadata or {}).get("retry_due_at")
            try:
                retry_due_at = float(retry_due_at_raw)
            except Exception:
                retry_due_at = now_ts
            with self.lock:
                self.retry_index[task.task_id] = (retry_due_at, task)
                heapq.heappush(self.retry_heap, (retry_due_at, task.task_id))
            restored += 1
        return restored

    def _zombie_cleaner_loop(self) -> None:
        while not self.stop_event.is_set():
            reclaimed = self._reclaim_zombies_once()
            if reclaimed > 0:
                with self.lock:
                    self.stats["zombie_reclaimed"] += reclaimed
            self.stop_event.wait(self.zombie_check_interval_seconds)

    def _reclaim_zombies_once(self) -> int:
        running_statuses = [
            TaskStatus.PENDING,
            TaskStatus.DOWNLOADING,
            TaskStatus.PROCESSING,
            TaskStatus.UPLOADING,
        ]
        reclaimed = 0
        for status in running_statuses:
            tasks = self.registry.list_by_status(status, limit=2000)
            for task in tasks:
                if status != TaskStatus.PENDING:
                    with self.lock:
                        if task.task_id in self.active_task_ids:
                            continue
                if not self._is_zombie_task(task, status):
                    continue
                age = int((datetime.now() - (task.started_at or task.created_at)).total_seconds())
                error = RuntimeError(
                    f"zombie task reclaimed after {age}s in status={status.value}"
                )
                self._fail_task(task, error, failed_from=status)
                reclaimed += 1
        return reclaimed

    def _is_zombie_task(self, task: UnifiedTask, status: TaskStatus) -> bool:
        timeout_seconds = float(
            self.zombie_timeout_by_status_seconds.get(status.value, self.zombie_timeout_seconds)
        )
        if timeout_seconds <= 0:
            return False
        if status == TaskStatus.PENDING:
            started_at = task.created_at
        else:
            started_at = task.started_at or task.assigned_at or task.created_at
        if started_at is None:
            return False
        age = (datetime.now() - started_at).total_seconds()
        return age > timeout_seconds

    def _build_zombie_timeout_by_status(self) -> Dict[str, float]:
        mapping_raw = self._get_worker_cfg("zombie_timeout_by_status_seconds", {})
        mapping = mapping_raw if isinstance(mapping_raw, dict) else {}
        defaults = {
            TaskStatus.PENDING.value: float(self.zombie_timeout_seconds),
            TaskStatus.DOWNLOADING.value: float(self.zombie_timeout_seconds),
            TaskStatus.PROCESSING.value: float(self.zombie_timeout_seconds),
            TaskStatus.UPLOADING.value: float(self.zombie_timeout_seconds),
        }
        resolved: Dict[str, float] = {}
        for status_value, default in defaults.items():
            per_status_key = f"zombie_timeout_{status_value}_seconds"
            per_status_value = self._get_worker_cfg(per_status_key, None)
            if per_status_value is not None:
                resolved[status_value] = self._coerce_timeout_seconds(per_status_value, default)
                continue
            map_value = mapping.get(status_value)
            if map_value is not None:
                resolved[status_value] = self._coerce_timeout_seconds(map_value, default)
                continue
            resolved[status_value] = float(default)
        return resolved

    def _coerce_timeout_seconds(self, value: Any, default: float) -> float:
        try:
            return max(5.0, float(value))
        except Exception:
            return max(5.0, float(default))

    def _recover_stuck_tasks(self) -> int:
        if not self.registry.is_persistent():
            return 0

        recoverable = [
            TaskStatus.ASSIGNED,
            TaskStatus.DOWNLOADING,
            TaskStatus.PROCESSING,
            TaskStatus.UPLOADING,
        ]
        recovered = 0
        for status in recoverable:
            tasks = self.registry.list_by_status(status, limit=2000)
            for task in tasks:
                queue_name = self._recovery_queue_for_task(task, status)
                next_status = TaskStatus.PROCESSING if queue_name == "upload" else TaskStatus.PENDING
                task.status = next_status
                if next_status == TaskStatus.PENDING:
                    task.started_at = None
                else:
                    task.started_at = task.started_at or datetime.now()
                task.completed_at = None
                self._persist_task(task)
                self._enqueue_task(queue_name, task)
                recovered += 1
        return recovered

    def _recovery_queue_for_task(self, task: UnifiedTask, old_status: TaskStatus) -> str:
        if old_status == TaskStatus.UPLOADING and self._has_uploadable_output(task):
            return "upload"
        if old_status == TaskStatus.PROCESSING:
            return "process"
        if old_status == TaskStatus.FAILED:
            return self._queue_for_retry_task(task)
        if old_status == TaskStatus.DOWNLOADING and self._needs_download(task):
            return "download"
        return self._initial_queue_for_task(task)

    def _get_queue_cfg(self, key: str, default: Any) -> Any:
        raw_queue = {}
        if isinstance(getattr(self.config, "raw", None), dict):
            raw_queue = self.config.raw.get("queue", {}) or {}
        env_key = f"CLONECUT_QUEUE_{key}".upper()
        env_val = os.getenv(env_key)
        if env_val is not None:
            return self._cast_cfg_value(env_val, default)
        if key in raw_queue:
            return self._cast_cfg_value(raw_queue.get(key), default)
        return default

    def _parse_retry_backoff(self, raw: Any) -> List[int]:
        if isinstance(raw, list):
            values = raw
        elif isinstance(raw, str):
            text = raw.strip()
            values = [item.strip() for item in text.split(",") if item.strip()]
        else:
            values = [5, 10, 20]

        parsed: List[int] = []
        for item in values:
            try:
                parsed.append(max(1, int(item)))
            except Exception:
                continue
        if not parsed:
            parsed = [5, 10, 20]
        return parsed

    def _get_worker_cfg(self, key: str, default: Any) -> Any:
        raw_worker = {}
        if isinstance(getattr(self.config, "raw", None), dict):
            raw_worker = self.config.raw.get("worker", {}) or {}

        env_key = f"CLONECUT_WORKER_{key}".upper()
        env_val = os.getenv(env_key)
        if env_val is not None:
            return self._cast_cfg_value(env_val, default)
        if key in raw_worker:
            return self._cast_cfg_value(raw_worker.get(key), default)
        return default

    def _cast_cfg_value(self, value: Any, default: Any) -> Any:
        if isinstance(default, bool):
            if isinstance(value, bool):
                return value
            return str(value).strip().lower() == "true"
        if isinstance(default, int):
            try:
                return int(value)
            except Exception:
                return default
        if isinstance(default, float):
            try:
                return float(value)
            except Exception:
                return default
        return value

    def _bool_cfg(self, raw: Optional[str], default: bool) -> bool:
        if raw is None:
            return default
        return raw.strip().lower() == "true"

    def _extract_optional_bool(self, *values: Any) -> Optional[bool]:
        for value in values:
            if value is None:
                continue
            if isinstance(value, bool):
                return value
            text = str(value).strip().lower()
            if not text:
                continue
            if text in {"1", "true", "yes", "y", "on"}:
                return True
            if text in {"0", "false", "no", "n", "off"}:
                return False
        return None

    def _queryable_statuses(self) -> List[TaskStatus]:
        return [
            TaskStatus.PENDING,
            TaskStatus.ASSIGNED,
            TaskStatus.DOWNLOADING,
            TaskStatus.PROCESSING,
            TaskStatus.UPLOADING,
            TaskStatus.COMPLETED,
            TaskStatus.FAILED,
            TaskStatus.CANCELLED,
        ]

    def _resolve_status_filter(self, status: Optional[str]) -> List[TaskStatus]:
        if status is None:
            return self._queryable_statuses()
        raw = str(status).strip().lower()
        if not raw or raw == "all":
            return self._queryable_statuses()
        known = {item.value for item in self._queryable_statuses()}
        if raw not in known:
            raise ValueError(f"invalid status filter: {status}")
        return [parse_task_status(raw)]

Output:
        task = self.registry.get(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return False, "task not found"
        if task.status != TaskStatus.FAILED:
            return False, f"only failed task can retry, current={task.status.value}"

        self._remove_retry_schedule(task.task_id)
        if int(task.retry_count) >= int(task.max_retries):
            task.max_retries = int(task.retry_count) + 1

        task.metadata = dict(task.metadata or {})
        task.metadata["manual_retry"] = True
        task.metadata["manual_retry_at"] = datetime.now().isoformat()
        self._enqueue_retry_task(task)
        with self.lock:
            self.stats["retried"] += 1
        return True, ""

    def _download_loop(self) -> None:
        while not self.stop_event.is_set():
            task = self._dequeue_stage_task("download")
            if task is None:
                continue
            self._mark_stage_active("download", +1)
            self._mark_task_active(task.task_id, True)
            try:
                self._run_download_stage(task)
            finally:
                self._mark_task_active(task.task_id, False)
                self._mark_stage_active("download", -1)

    def _process_loop(self) -> None:
        while not self.stop_event.is_set():
            task = self._dequeue_stage_task("process")
            if task is None:
                continue
            self._mark_stage_active("process", +1)
            self._mark_task_active(task.task_id, True)
            try:
                self._run_process_stage(task)
            finally:
                self._mark_task_active(task.task_id, False)
                self._mark_stage_active("process", -1)

    def _upload_loop(self) -> None:
        while not self.stop_event.is_set():
            task = self._dequeue_stage_task("upload")
            if task is None:
                continue
            self._mark_stage_active("upload", +1)
            self._mark_task_active(task.task_id, True)
            try:
                self._run_upload_stage(task)
            finally:
                self._mark_task_active(task.task_id, False)
                self._mark_stage_active("upload", -1)

    def _run_download_stage(self, task: UnifiedTask) -> None:
        self._transition_status(task, TaskStatus.DOWNLOADING)
        task.stage_checkpoint = "download"
        task.current_stage = 0
        self._persist_task(task)
        self.logger.info("task downloading started: task_id=%s", task.task_id)

        try:
            if not self._needs_download(task):
                self._enqueue_task("process", task)
                return

            self._prepare_video_download_context(task)
            source_path = self._download_source_video(task)
            task.source_path = source_path
            task.metadata = dict(task.metadata or {})
            task.metadata["source_path"] = source_path
            task.metadata["downloaded_from"] = task.source_url or ""
            self._write_forum_post_info_snapshot(task)
            task.error_message = None
            self._persist_task(task)

            self._enqueue_task("process", task)
            self.logger.info(
                "task downloading completed: task_id=%s source_path=%s",
                task.task_id,
                source_path,
            )
        except Exception as exc:
            self._fail_task(task, exc, failed_from=TaskStatus.DOWNLOADING)

    def _run_process_stage(self, task: UnifiedTask) -> None:
        self._transition_status(task, TaskStatus.PROCESSING)
        task.stage_checkpoint = "process"
        self._persist_task(task)
        self.logger.info("task processing started: task_id=%s", task.task_id)

        try:
            if task.task_type in {TaskType.TTS, TaskType.VOICE_CLONE}:
                result = self._process_tts_like(task)
            else:
                result = self._process_video_like(task)
            if task.task_type == TaskType.VIDEO:
                result = self._apply_video_output_naming(task, result)
                result = self._attach_video_render_manifest(task, result)

            task.result = result
            task.output_path = result.get("output_path")
            if task.output_path and task.output_path not in task.output_files:
                task.output_files.append(task.output_path)
            task.error_message = None
            self._persist_task(task)

            if task.output_path and Path(task.output_path).exists():
                self._enqueue_task("upload", task)
                return
            self._complete_task(task)
        except Exception as exc:
            self._fail_task(task, exc, failed_from=TaskStatus.PROCESSING)

    def _run_upload_stage(self, task: UnifiedTask) -> None:
        self._transition_status(task, TaskStatus.UPLOADING)
        task.stage_checkpoint = "upload"
        self._persist_task(task)
        self.logger.info("task uploading started: task_id=%s", task.task_id)
        started = time.perf_counter()

        try:
            upload_result = self._upload_output(task)
            upload_result["duration_ms"] = int(max(0.0, (time.perf_counter() - started) * 1000))
            result = dict(task.result or {})
            result["upload"] = upload_result
            task.result = result
            task.metadata = dict(task.metadata or {})
            task.metadata["upload_duration_ms"] = upload_result["duration_ms"]
            task.error_message = None
            self._persist_task(task)
            self._complete_task(task)
        except Exception as exc:
            self._fail_task(task, exc, failed_from=TaskStatus.UPLOADING)

    def _dequeue_stage_task(self, stage: str) -> Optional[UnifiedTask]:
        pop_map = {
            "download": self.queue_adapter.pop_download,
            "process": self.queue_adapter.pop_process,
            "upload": self.queue_adapter.pop_upload,
        }
        pop_fn = pop_map.get(stage)
        if pop_fn is None:
            return None

        while not self.stop_event.is_set():
            queued_task = pop_fn(timeout=1.0)
            if queued_task is None:
                return None
            task = self.registry.get(queued_task.task_id)
            if task is None:
                self._persist_task(queued_task)
                task = queued_task
            if task.status in {TaskStatus.COMPLETED, TaskStatus.FAILED, TaskStatus.CANCELLED}:
                self.logger.info(
                    "skip task from %s queue due to terminal status: task_id=%s status=%s",
                    stage,
                    task.task_id,
                    task.status.value,
                )
                continue
            target_queue = self._target_queue_for_task(task)
            if target_queue != stage:
                self.logger.info(
                    "reroute stale queued task: task_id=%s popped=%s target=%s status=%s",
                    task.task_id,
                    stage,
                    target_queue,
                    task.status.value,
                )
                self._enqueue_task(target_queue, task)
                continue
            return task
        return None

    def _enqueue_task(self, queue_name: str, task: UnifiedTask) -> None:
        if queue_name == "download":
            self.queue_adapter.push_download(task)
            return
        if queue_name == "upload":
            self.queue_adapter.push_upload(task)
            return
        self.queue_adapter.push_process(task)

    def _spawn_workers(self, stage: str, count: int, target: Any) -> None:
        for idx in range(count):
            thread = Thread(
                target=target,
                name=f"worker-{stage}-{idx + 1}",
                daemon=True,
            )
            thread.start()
            self.worker_threads.append(thread)

    def _mark_stage_active(self, stage: str, delta: int) -> None:
        with self.lock:
            current = self.active_workers.get(stage, 0)
            self.active_workers[stage] = max(0, current + delta)
            self.stats["running"] = sum(self.active_workers.values())

    def _complete_task(self, task: UnifiedTask) -> None:
        self._transition_status(task, TaskStatus.COMPLETED)
        task.stage_checkpoint = "completed"
        task.error_message = None
        self._persist_task(task)
        with self.lock:
            self.stats["completed"] += 1
        self.logger.info("task completed: task_id=%s", task.task_id)

    def _fail_task(
        self,
        task: UnifiedTask,
        error: Exception,
        failed_from: Optional[TaskStatus] = None,
    ) -> None:
        failed_from_status = failed_from or task.status
        task.metadata = dict(task.metadata or {})
        task.metadata["failed_from_status"] = failed_from_status.value
        task.metadata["retryable_failure"] = self._is_retryable_failure(
            error=error,
            failed_from=failed_from_status,
        )
        task.error_message = str(error)
        self._persist_task(task)
        transitioned = self._transition_status(task, TaskStatus.FAILED, strict=False)
        if not transitioned:
            self.logger.warning(
                "failed to mark task as failed: task_id=%s current=%s",

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from typing import Any, Dict, List

_TASK_STATUSES = [
    "pending",
    "downloading",
    "processing",
    "uploading",
    "completed",
    "failed",
]


def build_worker_status(now: datetime | None = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    ts = now or datetime.now()
    queue_sizes = {"download": 2, "process": 3, "upload": 1}
    workers = {"download": 1, "process": 2, "upload": 1}
    task_status_counts = {
        "total": 42,
        "pending": 8,
        "downloading": 6,
        "processing": 7,
        "uploading": 4,
        "completed": 14,
        "failed": 3,
    }
    return {
        "status": "mock_online",
        "is_busy": True,
        "total_queue_size": sum(queue_sizes.values()) + sum(workers.values()),
        "queue_sizes": queue_sizes,
        "workers": workers,
        "task_status_counts": task_status_counts,
        "queues": {"retried": 2},
        "uptime_seconds": 3605,
        "timestamp": ts.isoformat(),
    }


def build_worker_resources() -> Dict[str, Any]:
    return {
        "cpu_percent": 26.4,
        "memory_percent": 61.2,
        "disk_percent": 47.7,
        "gpus": [{"name": "mock-gpu-0", "utilization_percent": 33.5, "memory_percent": 24.0}],
        "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat(),
    }


def build_worker_tasks(limit: int = 10) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    safe_limit = max(1, min(200, int(limit)))
    tasks: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
    for idx in range(safe_limit):
        status = _TASK_STATUSES[idx % len(_TASK_STATUSES)]
        task_id = f"mock-task-{idx + 1:04d}"
        tasks.append(
            {
                "task_id": task_id,
                "status": status,
                "source_url": f"https://example.com/video/{idx + 1}",
                "priority": "normal" if idx % 2 == 0 else "high",
                "error_message": "mock failed" if status == "failed" else "",
                "created_at": (datetime.now() - timedelta(minutes=idx)).isoformat(),
            }
        )
    return tasks


def build_monitor_cluster_status(now: datetime | None = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    ts = now or datetime.now()
    machines = [
        {
            "url": "http://10.0.0.11:18205",
            "host": "10.0.0.11",
            "port": 18205,
            "priority": 1,
            "is_online": True,
            "is_busy": True,
            "current_tasks": 3,
            "last_check": ts.strftime("%H:%M:%S"),
            "response_time": 12.5,
            "last_error": None,
        },
        {
            "url": "http://10.0.0.12:18205",
            "host": "10.0.0.12",
            "port": 18205,
            "priority": 2,
            "is_online": True,
            "is_busy": False,
            "current_tasks": 1,
            "last_check": ts.strftime("%H:%M:%S"),
            "response_time": 18.2,
            "last_error": None,
        },
    ]
    map_nodes = [
        {
            "id": "node-1",
            "name": "worker-sh-1",
            "host": "10.0.0.11",
            "lat": 31.2304,
            "lng": 121.4737,
            "group": "cn-east",
            "load": 0.72,
            "online": True,
        },
        {
            "id": "node-2",
            "name": "worker-bj-1",
            "host": "10.0.0.12",
            "lat": 39.9042,
            "lng": 116.4074,
            "group": "cn-north",
            "load": 0.35,
            "online": True,
        },
    ]
    return {
        "monitoring_active": True,
        "queue_size": 4,
        "stats": {
            "total_tasks_received": 66,
            "total_tasks_sent": 59,
            "successful_tasks": 56,
            "failed_tasks": 3,
            "discovery_tasks": 24,
        },
        "machines": machines,
        "map": {
            "enabled": True,
            "nodes": map_nodes,
            "generated_at": ts.isoformat(),
        },
        "recent_forum_posts": [
            {
                "task_id": "forum-1001",
                "hotwords": ["演示", "转场", "混剪"],
                "cover_title_up": "爆款开场",
                "cover_title_middle": "三秒留人",
                "cover_title_down": "节奏拉满",
            }
        ],
        "timestamp": ts.isoformat(),
    }


__all__ = [
    "build_monitor_cluster_status",
    "build_worker_resources",
    "build_worker_status",
    "build_worker_tasks",
]

Output:
app:
  name: clonecut
  env: production
  role: worker
  host: 0.0.0.0
  port: 8205

redis:
  host: 127.0.0.1
  port: 6379
  db: 0
  password: ""
  namespace: "clonecut_worker:"

paths:
  input_dir: D:/clonecut/input
  output_dir: D:/clonecut/output
  log_dir: D:/clonecut/logs

queue:
  max_retries: 3
  retry_backoff_seconds: [5, 10, 20]
  dedup_ttl_seconds: 86400

worker:
  max_download_workers: 2
  max_process_workers: 2
  max_upload_workers: 2
  # Built-in TTS/voice-clone path. Enabled by default.
  tts_enable: true
  # local | http | auto (auto=local first then http fallback)
  tts_engine: "local"
  tts_default_voice: ""
  tts_local_sample_rate_hz: 24000
  # Optional HTTP bridge endpoint, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:9000
  tts_api_endpoint: ""
  tts_api_timeout_seconds: 15
  # Optional external video processor command.
  # Available placeholders: {task_id} {source_url} {source_path} {output_dir} {output_file}
  video_command_template: ""
  video_command_timeout_seconds: 7200
  # Upload storage backend. Current supported value: local
  upload_storage_backend: "local"
  # Forum reply during upload stage. Only applies to video tasks carrying forum thread context.
  forum_upload_enabled: true
  forum_reply_content: "Video processing completed"
  forum_settings_path: "config/forum_settings.yaml"
  # Upload-stage retry backoff (seconds), used only for upload failures.
  upload_retry_backoff_seconds: [1, 2, 4]
  # Built-in stage pipeline switch (stage1~8). Enabled by default after B1 pass.
  use_internal_pipeline: true
  # Tiny-input migration fallback threshold in bytes. Set 0 to disable.
  internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 0
  # Retry/Zombie background scheduler tuning.
  retry_check_interval_seconds: 1
  zombie_timeout_seconds: 7200
  zombie_timeout_by_status_seconds:
    pending: 7200
    downloading: 7200
    processing: 7200
    uploading: 7200
  zombie_check_interval_seconds: 300

monitor:
  dispatch_interval_seconds: 2
  health_check_interval_seconds: 10
  # legacy key alias, same meaning as health_check_interval_seconds
  check_interval_seconds: 10
  dispatch_timeout_seconds: 5
  forum_discovery_enabled: true
  forum_check_interval_seconds: 10

llm:
  # Supported providers: rule/openai/deepseek/qwen/kimi/g4f
  provider: "rule"
  # Provider-specific model name. Keep empty to let adapters use their defaults.
  model: ""
  # API key for remote providers. Not required for `rule`.
  api_key: ""
  # Optional provider endpoint override (compatible OpenAI base URL).
  base_url: ""
  # Stream output switch for adapters implementing stream_call.
  stream: false
  # Request timeout in seconds.
  timeout_seconds: 25.0

from __future__ import annotations

from datetime import datetime
import heapq
import json
import logging
import os
from pathlib import Path
import re
import shutil
import subprocess
from threading import Event, RLock, Thread
import time
from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Tuple
from urllib.parse import unquote, urlparse
import uuid

import requests

from adapters.forum_discuz.http_client import ForumHttpClient
from adapters.forum_discuz.replier import ForumReplier
from adapters.forum_discuz.content_processor import ForumContentProcessor
from adapters.forum_discuz.crawler import ForumCrawler
from adapters.queue_redis import RedisQueueAdapter, build_redis_client
from adapters.storage_db import SqliteStorageAdapter
from adapters.storage_local import UploadStorageAdapter, build_default_storage_adapter
from adapters.tts_engine import HttpTtsAdapter, LocalTtsAdapter
from adapters.video_pipeline import ExternalVideoCommandAdapter
from domain.video import VideoPipeline, VideoPipelineConfig
from domain.task.models import (
    TaskStatus,
    TaskType,
    UnifiedTask,
    parse_task_priority,
    parse_task_status,
    parse_task_type,
)
from domain.task.redis_registry import RedisTaskRegistry
from infra.telemetry import PerformanceTracker, ReportGenerator, ResourceMonitor


class RetryableUploadError(RuntimeError):
    """Upload failure that should be retried by queue scheduler."""


class NonRetryableUploadError(RuntimeError):
    """Upload failure that must not be retried by queue scheduler."""


RESULT_SCHEMA_VERSION = "1.0"
INTERNAL_PIPELINE_STAGE_ORDER = [
    "stage0_clean",
    "stage1_transcode",
    "stage2_silence",
    "stage3_repair",
    "stage4_asr",
    "stage5_ai_text",
    "stage6_clip",
    "stage6_5_resub",
    "stage7_correct",
    "stage7_subtitle",
    "stage8_cover",
    "stage9_organize",
]
INTERNAL_PIPELINE_COMPLETION_BY_STAGE: dict[str, tuple[int, str]] = {
    "stage0_clean": (0, "stage0_clean"),
    "stage1_transcode": (1, "stage1_transcode"),
    "stage2_silence": (2, "stage2_silence"),
    "stage3_repair": (3, "stage3_repair"),
    "stage4_asr": (4, "stage4_asr"),
    "stage5_ai_text": (5, "stage5_ai_text"),
    "stage6_clip": (6, "stage6_clip"),
    "stage6_5_resub": (6, "stage6_5_resub"),
    "stage7_correct": (6, "stage6_5_resub"),
    "stage7_subtitle": (7, "stage7_subtitle"),
    "stage8_cover": (8, "stage8_cover"),
    "stage9_organize": (9, "stage9_organize"),
}


class WorkerService:
    def __init__(self, config: Any, logger: Optional[logging.Logger] = None) -> None:
        self.config = config
        self.logger = logger or logging.getLogger("clonecut.worker.service")
        self.booted_at = time.time()
        self.redis_client = build_redis_client(
            host=str(getattr(config, "redis_host", "127.0.0.1")),
            port=int(getattr(config, "redis_port", 6379)),
            db=int(getattr(config, "redis_db", 0)),
            password=str(getattr(config, "redis_password", "")),
            logger=self.logger,
        )
        self.registry = RedisTaskRegistry(
            redis_client=self.redis_client,
            namespace=str(getattr(config, "redis_namespace", "clonecut_worker:")),
            logger=self.logger,
        )
        self.dedup_ttl_seconds = max(60, int(self._get_queue_cfg("dedup_ttl_seconds", 24 * 3600)))
        self.queue_adapter = RedisQueueAdapter(
            redis_client=self.redis_client,
            namespace=str(getattr(config, "redis_namespace", "clonecut_worker:")),
            dedup_ttl_seconds=self.dedup_ttl_seconds,
            logger=self.logger,
        )
        self.use_redis_queue = self.queue_adapter.is_persistent()
        self.task_storage = self._init_task_storage()
        self.lock = RLock()
        self.stop_event = Event()
        self.worker_threads: List[Thread] = []
        self.active_workers: Dict[str, int] = {
            "download": 0,
            "process": 0,
            "upload": 0,
        }

        self.stats: Dict[str, int] = {
            "received": 0,
            "completed": 0,
            "failed": 0,
            "running": 0,
            "retried": 0,
            "zombie_reclaimed": 0,
        }

        self.max_download_workers = max(1, int(self._get_worker_cfg("max_download_workers", 2)))
        self.max_process_workers = max(1, int(self._get_worker_cfg("max_process_workers", 2)))
        self.max_upload_workers = max(1, int(self._get_worker_cfg("max_upload_workers", 2)))
        self.download_timeout_seconds = max(
            30,
            int(self._get_worker_cfg("download_timeout_seconds", 600)),
        )
        self.download_chunk_size = max(
            1024,
            int(self._get_worker_cfg("download_chunk_size", 8192)),
        )
        self.max_retries_default = max(0, int(self._get_queue_cfg("max_retries", 3)))
        self.retry_backoff_seconds = self._parse_retry_backoff(
            self._get_queue_cfg("retry_backoff_seconds", [5, 10, 20])
        )
        self.upload_retry_backoff_seconds = self._parse_retry_backoff(
            self._get_worker_cfg("upload_retry_backoff_seconds", [1, 2, 4])
        )
        self.retry_check_interval_seconds = max(
            0.2,
            float(self._get_worker_cfg("retry_check_interval_seconds", 1.0)),
        )
        self.zombie_timeout_seconds = max(
            self.download_timeout_seconds,
            int(self._get_worker_cfg("zombie_timeout_seconds", 7200)),
        )
        self.zombie_check_interval_seconds = max(
            2.0,
            float(self._get_worker_cfg("zombie_check_interval_seconds", 300.0)),
        )
        self.zombie_timeout_by_status_seconds = self._build_zombie_timeout_by_status()
        self.retry_heap: List[Tuple[float, str]] = []
        self.retry_index: Dict[str, Tuple[float, UnifiedTask]] = {}
        self.active_task_ids: set[str] = set()

        Path(self.config.input_dir).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        Path(self.config.output_dir).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        self.upload_root = Path(self.config.output_dir) / "_uploaded"
        self.upload_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        self.upload_storage_backend = str(
            self._get_worker_cfg("upload_storage_backend", "local")
        ).strip().lower() or "local"
        if self.upload_storage_backend != "local":
            self.logger.warning(
                "unsupported upload storage backend=%s, fallback to local",
                self.upload_storage_backend,
            )
            self.upload_storage_backend = "local"
        self.storage_adapter: UploadStorageAdapter = build_default_storage_adapter(
            upload_root=str(self.upload_root),
            logger=self.logger,
        )
        self.forum_upload_enabled = self._bool_cfg(
            os.getenv("CLONECUT_FORUM_UPLOAD_ENABLED"),
            bool(self._get_worker_cfg("forum_upload_enabled", True)),
        )
        self.forum_reply_content = str(
            self._get_worker_cfg("forum_reply_content", "Video processing completed")
        ).strip() or "Video processing completed"
        self.forum_settings_path = str(
            self._get_worker_cfg("forum_settings_path", "config/forum_settings.yaml")
        ).strip() or "config/forum_settings.yaml"

        self.tts_adapter_enabled = self._bool_cfg(
            os.getenv("CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE"),
            bool(self._get_worker_cfg("tts_enable", True)),
        )
        tts_engine_mode_raw = str(
            os.getenv("CLONECUT_TTS_ENGINE", self._get_worker_cfg("tts_engine", "local"))
        ).strip().lower()
        if tts_engine_mode_raw not in {"local", "http", "auto"}:
            tts_engine_mode_raw = "local"
        self.tts_engine_mode = tts_engine_mode_raw
        tts_default_voice = str(self._get_worker_cfg("tts_default_voice", ""))
        tts_api_endpoint = str(self._get_worker_cfg("tts_api_endpoint", ""))
        tts_api_timeout_raw = self._get_worker_cfg("tts_api_timeout_seconds", 15)
        tts_local_sample_rate_raw = self._get_worker_cfg("tts_local_sample_rate_hz", 24000)
        try:
            tts_api_timeout = float(tts_api_timeout_raw)
        except Exception:
            tts_api_timeout = 15.0
        try:
            tts_local_sample_rate = int(tts_local_sample_rate_raw)
        except Exception:
            tts_local_sample_rate = 24000
        tts_local_sample_rate_env = os.getenv(
            "CLONECUT_TTS_LOCAL_SAMPLE_RATE_HZ",
            str(tts_local_sample_rate),
        )
        try:
            tts_local_sample_rate_value = int(tts_local_sample_rate_env)
        except Exception:
            tts_local_sample_rate_value = tts_local_sample_rate
        self.tts_local_adapter = LocalTtsAdapter(
            enabled=self.tts_adapter_enabled,
            output_dir=self.config.output_dir,
            default_voice=os.getenv("CLONECUT_TTS_DEFAULT_VOICE", tts_default_voice),
            sample_rate_hz=tts_local_sample_rate_value,
            logger=self.logger,
        )
        self.tts_http_adapter = HttpTtsAdapter(
            enabled=self.tts_adapter_enabled,
            default_voice=os.getenv("CLONECUT_TTS_DEFAULT_VOICE", tts_default_voice),
            api_endpoint=os.getenv("CLONECUT_TTS_API_ENDPOINT", tts_api_endpoint),
            api_timeout_seconds=float(
                os.getenv("CLONECUT_TTS_API_TIMEOUT_SECONDS", str(tts_api_timeout))
            ),
            logger=self.logger,
        )

        video_cmd = str(self._get_worker_cfg("video_command_template", ""))
        video_timeout_raw = self._get_worker_cfg("video_command_timeout_seconds", 7200)
        try:
            video_timeout = int(video_timeout_raw)
        except Exception:
            video_timeout = 7200

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import hashlib
import json
from pathlib import Path
from types import SimpleNamespace
import time

import pytest

from apps.worker.service import NonRetryableUploadError, WorkerService
from domain.task.models import TaskStatus, TaskType, UnifiedTask
from domain.video.stages.base import StageResult
import domain.video.pipeline as video_pipeline_module


@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
def _set_fast_pipeline_env(monkeypatch) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    # Keep stage execution deterministic in CI/local without heavyweight ASR inference.
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_ASR_BACKEND", "sidecar")
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_STAGE2_MODE", "copy")


def _build_config(tmp_path) -> SimpleNamespace:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    ns_hash = hashlib.md5(str(tmp_path).encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()
    namespace = f"clonecut_worker_unit_{ns_hash}:"
    return SimpleNamespace(
        redis_host="127.0.0.1",
        redis_port=6379,
        redis_db=0,
        redis_password="",
        redis_namespace=namespace,
        input_dir=str(tmp_path / "input"),
        output_dir=str(tmp_path / "output"),
        log_dir=str(tmp_path / "logs"),
        raw={
            "queue": {
                "max_retries": 2,
                "retry_backoff_seconds": [1, 1, 1],
            },
            "worker": {
                "max_download_workers": 1,
                "max_process_workers": 1,
                "max_upload_workers": 1,
                "download_timeout_seconds": 30,
                "download_chunk_size": 4096,
                "tts_enable": True,
                "tts_engine": "local",
                "use_internal_pipeline": False,
                "video_command_template": "",
                "retry_check_interval_seconds": 0.2,
                "zombie_timeout_seconds": 1,
                "zombie_check_interval_seconds": 0.2,
            },
        },
    )


def test_video_task_flows_download_process_upload(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source = tmp_path / "source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video-content")

    service.start()
    try:
        ok, task_id, error = service.submit(
            {
                "task_type": "video",
                "source_url": str(source),
                "metadata": {"source": "unit"},
            }
        )
        assert ok
        assert not error
        assert task_id

        deadline = time.time() + 10
        final_task = None
        while time.time() < deadline:
            final_task = service.get_task(task_id)
            if final_task and final_task.get("status") == "completed":
                break
            time.sleep(0.05)

        assert isinstance(final_task, dict)
        assert final_task.get("status") == "completed"
        assert Path(str(final_task.get("source_path"))).exists()

        result = final_task.get("result")
        assert isinstance(result, dict)
        assert result.get("engine") == "internal_pipeline_auto"
        upload = result.get("upload")
        assert isinstance(upload, dict)
        uploaded_path = upload.get("uploaded_path")
        assert isinstance(uploaded_path, str) and uploaded_path
        assert Path(uploaded_path).exists()
    finally:
        service.stop()


def test_failed_task_auto_retries_until_success(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_retry.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    source = tmp_path / "retry-source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video-content")

    original = service._process_video_like
    attempts = {"count": 0}

    def flaky_process(task):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        attempts["count"] += 1
        if attempts["count"] == 1:
            raise RuntimeError("inject process failure")
        return original(task)

    service._process_video_like = flaky_process  # type: ignore[method-assign]

    service.start()
    try:
        ok, task_id, error = service.submit(
            {
                "task_type": "video",
                "source_url": str(source),
                "metadata": {"source": "retry-test"},
            }
        )
        assert ok
        assert not error

        deadline = time.time() + 15
        final_task = None
        while time.time() < deadline:
            final_task = service.get_task(task_id)
            if final_task and final_task.get("status") == "completed" and attempts["count"] >= 2:
                break
            time.sleep(0.1)

        assert attempts["count"] >= 2
        assert isinstance(final_task, dict)
        assert final_task.get("status") == "completed"
        assert int(final_task.get("retry_count", 0)) >= 1
    finally:
        service.stop()


def test_process_video_like_fast_fallback_for_tiny_placeholder_video(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_fast_fallback.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    cfg.raw["worker"]["internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes"] = 1024
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source = tmp_path / "tiny.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video-content")

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="tiny-video-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_path=str(source),
        metadata={"source": "unit"},
    )

    called = {"count": 0}

    class FakeVideoPipeline:
        def __init__(self, *args, **kwargs) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = args
            _ = kwargs

        def run(self, *args, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            called["count"] += 1
            raise AssertionError("migration fallback should skip VideoPipeline")

    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.worker.service.VideoPipeline", FakeVideoPipeline, raising=False)

    result = service._process_video_like(task)

    assert called["count"] == 0
    assert result.get("engine") == "internal_pipeline_auto"
    assert result.get("executed_mode") == "fallback_copy"
    output_path = result.get("output_path")
    assert isinstance(output_path, str) and output_path
    assert Path(output_path).exists()


def test_zombie_task_reclaimed_then_requeued(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_zombie.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    zombie = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="zombie-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_url=str(tmp_path / "missing.mp4"),
        status=TaskStatus.PROCESSING,
        current_stage=3,
        stage_checkpoint="stage3_repair",
        max_retries=1,
    )
    zombie.started_at = datetime.now() - timedelta(seconds=40)
    service._persist_task(zombie)

    reclaimed = service._reclaim_zombies_once()
    assert reclaimed == 1

    time.sleep(1.2)
    ready = service._dequeue_ready_retries()
    assert len(ready) == 1
    service._enqueue_retry_task(ready[0])

    queued = service.queue_adapter.pop_process(timeout=0.1)
    assert queued is not None
    assert queued.task_id == "zombie-1"
    loaded = service.get_task("zombie-1")
    assert isinstance(loaded, dict)
    assert loaded.get("status") == "pending"


def test_zombie_reclaim_uses_status_specific_thresholds(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_zombie_threshold.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    cfg.raw["worker"]["zombie_timeout_by_status_seconds"] = {
        "pending": 1,
        "downloading": 120,
        "processing": 120,
        "uploading": 120,
    }
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    pending_task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="pending-zombie-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_url=str(tmp_path / "pending.mp4"),
        status=TaskStatus.PENDING,
    )
    pending_task.created_at = datetime.now() - timedelta(seconds=10)
    service._persist_task(pending_task)

    processing_task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="processing-fresh-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_url=str(tmp_path / "processing.mp4"),
        status=TaskStatus.PROCESSING,
    )
    processing_task.started_at = datetime.now() - timedelta(seconds=10)
    service._persist_task(processing_task)

    reclaimed = service._reclaim_zombies_once()
    assert reclaimed == 1

    pending_loaded = service.get_task("pending-zombie-1")
    processing_loaded = service.get_task("processing-fresh-1")
    assert isinstance(pending_loaded, dict)
    assert isinstance(processing_loaded, dict)
    assert pending_loaded.get("status") == TaskStatus.FAILED.value
    assert processing_loaded.get("status") == TaskStatus.PROCESSING.value


def test_internal_pipeline_executes_stage1_to_stage8(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source = tmp_path / "internal-source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video-content" * 128)
    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="internal-pipeline-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_path=str(source),
        payload={"clip_text": "user supplied clip text"},
        metadata={
            "source": "unit",
            "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "123", "title": "topic"},
        },
    )

    captured: dict[str, object] = {}
    expected_output = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "final.mp4"

    class FakeVideoPipeline:
        def __init__(self, config, logger=None, performance_tracker=None, resource_monitor=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            captured["config_output_dir"] = config.output_dir
            captured["logger"] = logger
            captured["performance_tracker"] = performance_tracker
            captured["resource_monitor"] = resource_monitor

        def run(self, input_video, task_id, start_from_stage=0, forum_post_info=None):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            expected_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            expected_output.write_bytes(b"final-video")
            clip_text_path = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task_id / "clip_text.txt"
            captured["input_video"] = input_video
            captured["task_id"] = task_id
            captured["start_from_stage"] = start_from_stage
            captured["forum_post_info"] = forum_post_info
            captured["clip_text"] = clip_text_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
            return SimpleNamespace(
                success=True,
                output_file=str(expected_output),
                executed_stages=["stage1_transcode", "stage8_cover", "stage9_organize"],
                performance_summary="video pipeline ok",
                current_stage=11,
                last_stage="stage9_organize",
                failed_stage=None,
                performance_report=None,
            )

    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.worker.service.VideoPipeline", FakeVideoPipeline, raising=False)
    monkeypatch.setattr(
        "apps.worker.service.subprocess.run",
        lambda *args, **kwargs: (_ for _ in ()).throw(AssertionError("legacy subprocess path should not run")),
    )
    monkeypatch.setattr(
        service,
        "_run_internal_video_pipeline_fallback_copy",
        lambda *args, **kwargs: (_ for _ in ()).throw(AssertionError("fallback copy should not run")),
    )

    result = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task, str(source))

    assert result.get("output_path") == str(expected_output)
    assert result.get("executed_mode") == "video_pipeline"
    executed = result.get("executed_stages") or []
    assert "stage1_transcode" in executed
    assert "stage8_cover" in executed
    assert captured["config_output_dir"] == str(Path(cfg.output_dir))
    assert captured["input_video"] == str(source)
    assert captured["task_id"] == task.task_id
    assert captured["start_from_stage"] == 0
    assert captured["forum_post_info"] == {"thread_id": "123", "title": "topic"}
    assert captured["clip_text"] == "user supplied clip text"
    assert task.current_stage == 11
    assert task.stage_checkpoint == "stage9_organize"
    assert (Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "forum_post_info.json").exists()
    assert (Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "clip_text.txt").exists()
    state_payload = json.loads((Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "state.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    assert state_payload["last_completed_step"] == 9
    assert state_payload["last_completed_step_name"] == "stage9_organize"
    assert state_payload["output_file"] == str(expected_output)


def test_internal_pipeline_real_video_pipeline_preserves_user_clip_text_into_stage6(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_real_pipeline.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source = tmp_path / "real-pipeline-source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video-content" * 128)
    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="real-pipeline-clip-text-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_path=str(source),
        payload={"clip_text": "user supplied clip text"},
        metadata={"source": "unit", "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "123"}},
    )

    final_output = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "final.mp4"

    def passthrough_stage(input_video, output_dir, task_id, *args, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        _ = output_dir
        _ = task_id
        _ = args
        _ = kwargs
        return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(input_video))

    def assert_clip_text_stage6(input_video, output_dir, task_id):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        clip_text_path = Path(output_dir) / task_id / "clip_text.txt"
        assert clip_text_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8") == "user supplied clip text"
        return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(input_video))

    def finalize_stage9(
        input_video,
        *,
        output_dir,
        task_id,
        keep_intermediate_files=False,
        forum_post_info=None,
        original_filename="",
    ):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        _ = input_video
        _ = keep_intermediate_files
        _ = forum_post_info
        _ = original_filename
        final_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        final_output.write_bytes(b"final-video")
        return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(final_output))

    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage0_clean", passthrough_stage)
    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage1_transcode", passthrough_stage)
    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage2_silence", passthrough_stage)
    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage3_repair", passthrough_stage)
    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage4_asr", passthrough_stage)
    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_clip", assert_clip_text_stage6)
    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_5_resub", passthrough_stage)
    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_correct", passthrough_stage)
    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_subtitle", passthrough_stage)
    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage8_cover", passthrough_stage)
    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage9_organize", finalize_stage9)

    result = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task, str(source))

    assert result.get("output_path") == str(final_output)
    assert result.get("executed_mode") == "video_pipeline"
    assert (Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "clip_text.txt").read_text(encoding="utf-8") == (
        "user supplied clip text"
    )


def test_attach_video_render_manifest_collects_primary_subtitle_cover_and_state(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_render_manifest.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    task_dir = Path(cfg.output_dir) / "render-manifest-task"
    task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    final_video = task_dir / "璁哄潧鏍锋湰_final.mp4"
    final_video.write_bytes(b"final-video")
    no_subtitle_video = task_dir / "璁哄潧鏍锋湰_鏅鸿兘鍓緫鏃犲瓧骞曠増.mp4"
    no_subtitle_video.write_bytes(b"no-subtitle")
    subtitle_srt = task_dir / "total.srt"
    subtitle_srt.write_text("1\n00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000\nhello\n", encoding="utf-8")
    subtitle_ass = task_dir / "total.ass"
    subtitle_ass.write_text("[Script Info]\n", encoding="utf-8")
    script_text = task_dir / "script.txt"
    script_text.write_text("鍘熷璇嗗埆鏂囨湰", encoding="utf-8")
    clip_text = task_dir / "clip_text.txt"
    clip_text.write_text("瑁佸壀鏂囨湰", encoding="utf-8")
    forum_post_info = task_dir / "forum_post_info.json"
    forum_post_info.write_text('{"thread_id":"123"}', encoding="utf-8")
    cover_image = task_dir / "璁哄潧灏侀潰鏍囬.png"
    cover_image.write_bytes(b"png")
    logs_dir = task_dir / "logs"
    logs_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    process_log = logs_dir / "funclip_20260326_150000.log"
    process_log.write_text("pipeline ok", encoding="utf-8")
    state_file = task_dir / "state.json"
    state_file.write_text(
        json.dumps(
            {
                "last_completed_step": 9,
                "output_file": str(final_video),
                "step_name": "鏂囦欢鏁寸悊",
            },
            ensure_ascii=False,
        ),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="render-manifest-task",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        source_path=str(tmp_path / "source.mp4"),
    )
    Path(str(task.source_path)).write_bytes(b"source-video")

    result = service._attach_video_render_manifest(
        task,
        {
            "success": True,
            "request_type": "video",
            "engine": "internal_pipeline",
            "output_path": str(final_video),
        },
    )

    artifacts = result.get("artifacts") or []
    roles = {str(item.get("role")): item for item in artifacts}
    assert "final_video" in roles
    assert roles["final_video"].get("is_primary") is True
    assert "subtitle_srt" in roles
    assert "subtitle_ass" in roles
    assert "clip_text" in roles
    assert "forum_post_info" in roles
    assert "cover_image" in roles
    assert "processing_log" in roles
    assert "pipeline_state" in roles

    render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest") or {}
    assert render_manifest.get("schema_version") == "1.0"
    assert render_manifest.get("primary_artifact_id") == roles["final_video"].get("artifact_id")
    subtitles = render_manifest.get("subtitles") or …2707 tokens truncated…         "source_url": str(source),
            "metadata": {"source": "unit"},
        }
    )
    assert ok
    assert not error
    assert task_id
    assert captured.get("ttl") == 321


def test_tts_task_without_adapter_raises_error(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_tts_disabled.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    cfg.raw["worker"]["tts_enable"] = False
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    task = UnifiedTask(task_id="tts-disabled", task_type=TaskType.TTS, source="unit")
    with pytest.raises(RuntimeError):
        service._process_tts_like(task)


def test_tts_task_uses_local_engine_by_default(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_tts_local.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="tts-local-default",
        task_type=TaskType.TTS,
        source="unit",
        payload={"text": "internal tts"},
    )

    result = service._process_tts_like(task)
    assert result.get("success") is True
    assert result.get("engine") == "tts_local"
    output_path = Path(str(result.get("output_path")))
    assert output_path.exists()


def test_build_task_normalizes_forum_post_info_and_source_url(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_forum_normalize.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    task = service._build_task(
        {
            "task_type": "video",
            "source_url": "https://forum.example.com/thread-123-1-1.html",
            "payload": {
                "video_urls": ["https://cdn.example.com/demo_source.mp4"],
                "hotwords": ["蹇壀", "AI", "ai"],
                "cover_title_up": "涓婃爣棰?,
                "cover_title_down": "涓嬫爣棰?,
                "original_filename": "demo_source.mp4",
            },
            "metadata": {
                "source": "forum",
                "forum_post_info": {
                    "hotwords": ["蹇壀", "璁哄潧"],
                    "灏侀潰鏍囬涓?: "涓爣棰?,
                    "original_filename": "demo_source.mp4",
                },
            },
        }
    )

    assert task.source_url == "https://forum.example.com/thread-123-1-1.html"
    info = task.metadata.get("forum_post_info") or {}
    assert info.get("hotwords") == ["蹇壀", "璁哄潧", "AI"]
    assert info.get("cover_title_up") == "涓婃爣棰?
    assert info.get("cover_title_middle") == "涓爣棰?
    assert info.get("cover_title_down") == "涓嬫爣棰?
    assert info.get("灏侀潰鏍囬涓?) == "涓婃爣棰?
    assert info.get("灏侀潰鏍囬涓?) == "涓爣棰?
    assert info.get("灏侀潰鏍囬涓?) == "涓嬫爣棰?
    assert task.metadata.get("original_filename") == "demo_source.mp4"
    assert task.payload.get("original_filename") == "demo_source.mp4"


def test_download_source_video_prefers_original_filename(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_forum_download.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)
    source = tmp_path / "raw_input.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video-content")

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="forum-download-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        source_url=str(source),
        metadata={"original_filename": "forum_named.mp4"},
    )

    local_path = Path(service._download_source_video(task))
    assert local_path.exists()
    assert local_path.name == "forum_named.mp4"
    assert local_path.read_bytes() == b"video-content"


def test_run_process_stage_applies_original_filename_naming(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_forum_naming.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source = tmp_path / "source.mp4"
    source.write_bytes(b"video")
    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="forum-name-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        source_path=str(source),
        metadata={
            "source": "forum",
            "original_filename": "forum_final.mp4",
            "forum_post_info": {"original_filename": "forum_final.mp4"},
        },
    )
    service._persist_task(task)

    stage_output = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / f"{task.task_id}.mp4"
    stage_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    stage_output.write_bytes(b"processed-video")

    def fake_process_video_like(_task):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        return {
            "success": True,
            "request_type": "video",
            "engine": "internal_pipeline",
            "output_path": str(stage_output),
        }

    enqueued: dict[str, str] = {}

    def fake_enqueue(queue_name, queued_task):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        enqueued["queue"] = queue_name
        enqueued["task_id"] = queued_task.task_id

    service._process_video_like = fake_process_video_like  # type: ignore[method-assign]
    service._enqueue_task = fake_enqueue  # type: ignore[method-assign]

    service._run_process_stage(task)

    assert enqueued.get("queue") == "upload"
    assert enqueued.get("task_id") == task.task_id
    assert task.output_path is not None
    final_output = Path(task.output_path)
    assert final_output.exists()
    assert final_output.name == "forum_final.mp4"
    assert final_output.read_bytes() == b"processed-video"
    assert stage_output.exists()
    assert task.result is not None
    assert task.result.get("output_path") == str(final_output)
    assert task.result.get("original_output_path") == str(stage_output)
    assert task.result.get("named_output_path") == str(final_output)


def test_apply_video_output_naming_keeps_equivalent_final_output(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_forum_keep_final.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    final_output = tmp_path / "out" / "璁哄潧鏍锋湰瑙嗛" / "璁哄潧鏍锋湰瑙嗛_final.mp4"
    final_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    final_output.write_bytes(b"processed-video")

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="forum-keep-final-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        source_path=str(tmp_path / "source.mp4"),
        metadata={
            "source": "forum",
            "original_filename": "璁哄潧鏍锋湰瑙嗛.mp4",
            "forum_post_info": {"original_filename": "璁哄潧鏍锋湰瑙嗛.mp4"},
        },
        payload={"original_filename": "璁哄潧鏍锋湰瑙嗛.mp4"},
    )
    task.source_path and Path(task.source_path).write_bytes(b"video")

    result = service._apply_video_output_naming(
        task,
        {
            "success": True,
            "request_type": "video",
            "engine": "internal_pipeline",
            "output_path": str(final_output),
        },
    )

    assert result.get("output_path") == str(final_output)
    assert result.get("named_output_path") is None
    assert not result.get("original_output_path")
    assert (task.metadata or {}).get("named_output_path") == str(final_output)


def test_upload_output_replies_forum_with_strict_attachment(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_upload_forum.db"))
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_BASE_URL", "https://forum.example.com")
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_USERNAME", "tester")
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_PASSWORD", "secret")
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    output_file = tmp_path / "forum-output.mp4"
    output_file.write_bytes(b"video-bytes")
    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="forum-upload-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        output_path=str(output_file),
        metadata={"forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "12345"}},
    )

    captured: dict[str, object] = {}

    class FakeReplier:
        def __init__(self, http_client, logger=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = logger
            captured["base_url"] = http_client.base_url

        def reply_with_attachments(self, thread_id, content, video_files, strict_attachment=False):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            captured["thread_id"] = thread_id
            captured["content"] = content
            captured["video_files"] = list(video_files)
            captured["strict_attachment"] = bool(strict_attachment)
            return True, ""

    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.worker.service.ForumReplier", FakeReplier)

    upload_result = service._upload_output(task)
    forum_reply = upload_result.get("forum_reply") or {}

    assert upload_result.get("success") is True
    assert upload_result.get("storage") == "local"
    assert forum_reply.get("attempted") is True
    assert forum_reply.get("success") is True
    assert forum_reply.get("thread_id") == "12345"
    assert captured.get("base_url") == "https://forum.example.com"
    assert captured.get("thread_id") == "12345"
    content = str(captured.get("content") or "")
    assert "馃幀 AI鏅鸿兘鍓緫瀹屾垚锛? in content
    assert "馃摑 鍘熷瑙嗛: 鏈煡鏂囦欢" in content
    assert "馃幆 澶勭悊缁撴灉: 1 涓増鏈? in content
    assert "馃摴 forum-output.mp4" in content
    assert "馃晵 澶勭悊鏃堕棿:" in content
    assert "馃 AI鍓緫鍔╂墜 - 鏅鸿兘瑙嗛澶勭悊瀹屾垚" in content
    assert captured.get("strict_attachment") is True


def test_upload_output_replies_forum_prefers_user_report(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_upload_forum_user_report.db"))
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_BASE_URL", "https://forum.example.com")
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_USERNAME", "tester")
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_PASSWORD", "secret")
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    output_file = tmp_path / "forum-output-user-report.mp4"
    output_file.write_bytes(b"video-bytes")
    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="forum-upload-user-report-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        output_path=str(output_file),
        metadata={
            "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "12345"},
            "user_report": "杩欐槸鐢ㄦ埛渚ф姤鍛婂唴瀹?,
        },
    )

    captured: dict[str, object] = {}

    class FakeReplier:
        def __init__(self, http_client, logger=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = http_client
            _ = logger

        def reply_with_attachments(self, thread_id, content, video_files, strict_attachment=False):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            captured["thread_id"] = thread_id
            captured["content"] = content
            captured["video_files"] = list(video_files)
            captured["strict_attachment"] = bool(strict_attachment)
            return True, ""

    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.worker.service.ForumReplier", FakeReplier)

    upload_result = service._upload_output(task)
    forum_reply = upload_result.get("forum_reply") or {}

    assert upload_result.get("success") is True
    assert forum_reply.get("attempted") is True
    assert forum_reply.get("success") is True
    assert forum_reply.get("thread_id") == "12345"
    assert captured.get("thread_id") == "12345"
    assert captured.get("content") == "杩欐槸鐢ㄦ埛渚ф姤鍛婂唴瀹?
    assert captured.get("strict_attachment") is True


def test_upload_output_forum_4xx_is_non_retryable(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_upload_forum_4xx.db"))
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_BASE_URL", "https://forum.example.com")
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_USERNAME", "tester")
    monkeypatch.setenv("FORUM_PASSWORD", "secret")
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    output_file = tmp_path / "forum-output-4xx.mp4"
    output_file.write_bytes(b"video-bytes")
    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="forum-upload-4xx",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        output_path=str(output_file),
        metadata={"forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "12345"}},
    )

    class FakeReplier:
        def __init__(self, http_client, logger=None) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = http_client
            _ = logger

        def reply_with_attachments(self, thread_id, content, video_files, strict_attachment=False):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = thread_id
            _ = content
            _ = video_files
            _ = strict_attachment
            return False, "attachment upload failed: traditional upload failed: status=403"

    monkeypatch.setattr("apps.worker.service.ForumReplier", FakeReplier)

    with pytest.raises(NonRetryableUploadError):
        service._upload_output(task)


def test_fail_task_skips_retry_for_non_retryable_upload_error(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_upload_non_retryable.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="upload-no-retry-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        status=TaskStatus.UPLOADING,
        max_retries=2,
    )
    service._persist_task(task)

    service._fail_task(
        task=task,
        error=NonRetryableUploadError("attachment upload failed: status=403"),
        failed_from=TaskStatus.UPLOADING,
    )

    assert task.status == TaskStatus.FAILED
    assert task.retry_count == 0
    assert (task.metadata or {}).get("retryable_failure") is False
    assert "retry_due_at" not in (task.metadata or {})


def test_retry_delay_uses_upload_backoff_series(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_upload_backoff.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    cfg.raw["queue"]["retry_backoff_seconds"] = [9, 9, 9]
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    upload_task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="upload-backoff-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        metadata={"failed_from_status": TaskStatus.UPLOADING.value},
    )
    process_task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="process-backoff-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="unit",
        metadata={"failed_from_status": TaskStatus.PROCESSING.value},
    )

    assert service._retry_delay_seconds(upload_task, 0) == 1
    assert service._retry_delay_seconds(upload_task, 1) == 2
    assert service._retry_delay_seconds(upload_task, 2) == 4
    assert service._retry_delay_seconds(process_task, 0) == 9


def test_run_download_stage_parses_forum_post_and_writes_forum_info_snapshot(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_forum_parse_download.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source_media = tmp_path / "post-source.mp4"
    source_media.write_bytes(b"forum-video")

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="forum-parse-download-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        source_url="https://forum.example.com/thread-9876-1-1.html",
        status=TaskStatus.PENDING,
        metadata={"source": "forum"},
        payload={},
    )
    service._persist_task(task)

    parsed_called: dict[str, str] = {}

    def fake_parse(post_url):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        parsed_called["post_url"] = post_url
        return {
            "post_url": post_url,
            "thread_id": "9876",
            "post_id": "9876",
            "video_url": str(source_media),
            "video_urls": [str(source_media)],
            "original_filename": "forum_topic.mp4",
            "title": "forum title",
            "author_name": "alice",
        }

    queued: dict[str, str] = {}

    def fake_enqueue(queue_name, queued_task):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        queued["queue"] = queue_name
        queued["task_id"] = queued_task.task_id

    service._resolve_forum_post_download_info = fake_parse  # type: ignore[method-assign]
    service._enqueue_task = fake_enqueue  # type: ignore[method-assign]

    service._run_download_stage(task)

    assert parsed_called.get("post_url") == "https://forum.example.com/thread-9876-1-1.html"
    assert queued.get("queue") == "process"
    assert queued.get("task_id") == task.task_id
    assert task.source_path is not None
    downloaded_path = Path(task.source_path)
    assert downloaded_path.exists()
    assert downloaded_path.name == "forum_topic.mp4"
    assert downloaded_path.read_bytes() == b"forum-video"
    info_path = Path(str((task.metadata or {}).get("forum_post_info_path", "")))
    assert info_path.exists()
    snapshot = info_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    assert '"thread_id": "9876"' in snapshot
    assert '"original_filename": "forum_topic.mp4"' in snapshot


def test_run_download_stage_direct_source_skips_forum_parse_and_still_writes_snapshot(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_forum_direct_download.db"))
    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
    service = WorkerService(cfg)

    source_media = tmp_path / "direct-source.mp4"
    source_media.write_bytes(b"direct-video")

    task = UnifiedTask(
        task_id="forum-direct-download-1",
        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
        source="forum",
        source_url=str(source_media),
        status=TaskStatus.PENDING,
        metadata={
            "source": "forum",
            "forum_post_info": {
                "thread_id": "4321",
                "post_url": "https://forum.example.com/thread-4321-1-1.html",
                "original_filename": "direct_source.mp4",
            },
        },
        payload={},
    )
    service._persist_task(task)

    def should_not_call(_post_url):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        raise AssertionError("forum post parser should not be called for direct media source")

    queued: dict[str, str] = {}

    def fake_enqueue(queue_name, queued_task):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        queued["queue"] = queue_name
        queued["task_id"] = queued_task.task_id

    service._resolve_forum_post_download_info = should_not_call  # type: ignore[method-assign]
    service._enqueue_task = fake_enqueue  # type: ignore[method-assign]

    service._run_download_stage(task)

    assert queued.get("queue") == "process"
    assert queued.get("task_id") == task.task_id
    assert task.source_path is not None
    downloaded_path = Path(task.source_path)
    assert downloaded_path.exists()
    assert downloaded_path.name == "direct_source.mp4"
    info_path = Path(str((task.metadata or {}).get("forum_post_info_path", "")))
    assert info_path.exists()
